title: AIO_Set Function
parameters:
Channel
		 Number	Specify the channel number of the analog
		 I/O.

index	Specify the index of acquiring configuration
		 information in integer.
see_also:
Returns the configuration information of the robot speed output which is set in optional analog I/O output channel.

AIO_InW Function, AIO_Out, AIO_OutW, AIO_Out Function, AIO_OutW Function, AIO_Set, Wait

AIO_Set Function
examples: Print "Analog Ch#1 speed output is: ", AIO_Set(1, 1)
